target_sites.name: mlbprediction
target_sites.angle: Analytics, advanced stats (xBA, WAR, xFIP), data-driven

news_items.headline: Konnor Griffin's Pirates contract includes $12M signing bonus
news_items.description: Konnor Griffin's $140 million, nine-year contract with the Pittsburgh Pirates includes a $12 million signing bonus payable over the next two years.

news_items.headline: MLB 2026: What we've learned so far about Dodgers, Mets
news_items.description: It's early. Still, the richest showdown in baseball history said a lot about both teams.

news_items.headline: Dodgers smashed MLB's spending record at $515M in 2025
news_items.description: The Dodgers shattered Major League Baseball's spending record in 2025 with a combined $515 million in payroll and luxury tax last season.

news_items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Reliever Depth Chart
news_items.description: Our updated reliever depth chart displays the closer hierarchy for each team, as well as the fatigue factor in each MLB bullpen.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
news_items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
news_items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.
